componentDescription: A versatile component displaying content typically positioned on the side, used for navigation or supplementary information.

children.description: Content to be rendered inside the Sidebar component.

position.description: Defines the placement of the sidebar relative to its parent container (e.g., 'left', 'right').

size.description: Specifies the predefined size of the sidebar, which can affect its width or height.

variant.description: Determines the visual style or behavior of the sidebar, such as 'temporary', 'permanent', or 'persistent'.

defaultExpanded.description: Initial expansion state of the sidebar when it is first rendered (uncontrolled mode).

expanded.description: Controls the expansion state of the sidebar (controlled mode). If provided, it overrides `defaultExpanded`.

onExpandedChange.description: Callback function triggered when the sidebar's expanded state changes, providing the new state.

fixed.description: If true, the sidebar will be fixed in position, not scrolling with the content.

hasBackdrop.description: If true, a backdrop will be displayed behind the sidebar when it's open, typically used for temporary variants.

showToggleButton.description: Controls the visibility of the expand/collapse toggle button in the sidebar header.

expandedWidth.description: Specifies the width of the sidebar when it is in the expanded state.

collapsedWidth.description: Specifies the width of the sidebar when it is in the collapsed state.

breakpoint.description: A numerical value (e.g., screen width) at which the sidebar's behavior or layout might change.

breakpointBehavior.description: Defines how the sidebar behaves when the screen size crosses the specified `breakpoint`.

elevation.description: Applies a shadow effect to the sidebar, indicating its depth or layering relative to other elements.

transitionPreset.description: Determines the animation preset to use when the sidebar transitions between states (e.g., expanding/collapsing).

ariaLabel.description: Provides an accessible label for the sidebar, improving usability for screen reader users.

views.description: Allows for custom styling or overriding default styles for various parts of the sidebar.
